definitions.tool: A stable normalized source record. Localized records are separate tools; explicit redirect aliases are records but are excluded from published counts.
definitions.liveTool: A canonical published non-redirect record with a repository destination.
definitions.liveToolExperience: A unique English published destination plus explicitly declared hidden country variants.
definitions.widget: A published widget registry record with a working iframe destination.
definitions.country: One of the 54 canonical African jurisdictions; ALL is a regional sentinel, not a country.
definitions.language: A site locale marked published; AI input languages and source-language claims are separate capabilities.

selectors.label: Published tool categories
selectors.definition: Canonical category records with published hubs.

selectors.label: Published African country hubs
selectors.definition: Canonical African jurisdictions with published country hubs; the ALL sentinel is excluded.

selectors.label: Country currencies
selectors.definition: Distinct currency codes assigned to canonical published African jurisdictions.

selectors.label: Flagship developer apps
selectors.definition: Curated deep developer workflows shown on the developer-tools landing page.

selectors.label: Published site languages
selectors.definition: Site locales marked published, including the default English locale and partial public locales.

selectors.label: API plans
selectors.definition: Canonical API quota tiers after aliases such as starter are collapsed.

selectors.label: Product subscription options
selectors.definition: Published currency and billing-interval options in the Pro product plan module.

selectors.label: Pro apps
selectors.definition: Published Pro application records with repository routes.

selectors.label: Canonical published tool records
selectors.definition: Published non-deprecated tool records after explicit route aliases are excluded.

selectors.label: Uniquely African published tool records
selectors.definition: Canonical published non-redirect tool records in category african.

selectors.label: Widget-enabled tool records
selectors.definition: Canonical published tool records linked to at least one published widget by canonical full-tool route.
